title: Jydan Writings
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Jydan Writings''' was a religious text of the [[Jydan]] religion and its derivative, [[Ni'Shaw-Dak Ministry|Ni'Shaw-Dak]] religion.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

The Jydan Writings told of the beginning of time and the galaxy being ruled by the gods. The gods, upon the Writings, favored the Ka'hren species.<ref name="AIR" />

The Jydan Writings included the teachings of the multiple Jydan gods, written by the three prophets of each individual god (as opposed to the other holy text of Jydan, the [[Volumes of Truth]], also written by the three prophets of each god but telling the god's ''laws and ethics'').<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
